meta.title: Civic IQ Quiz
meta.description: How much do you really know about India's civic rules?

questions.q: Under which act is spitting in public spaces illegal in India?
questions.exp: Most Indian cities have Municipal Corporation Acts that prohibit spitting in public places.

questions.q: What is the fine for not wearing a helmet while riding a two-wheeler in India?
questions.exp: Under the Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act 2019, the fine for not wearing a helmet is ₹1000.

questions.q: Which Article of the Indian Constitution makes protecting the environment a Fundamental Duty?
questions.exp: Article 51A(g) says it is the duty of every citizen to protect and improve the natural environment.
RTI stands for Right to Information Act, 2005 — a powerful tool for every Indian citizen.

questions.q: Under which law is honking near a hospital prohibited?
questions.exp: CPCB Noise Pollution Rules 2000 and IPC Section 294 together cover public nuisance including unnecessary honking.

questions.q: The Swachh Bharat Mission was launched in which year?
questions.exp: Swachh Bharat Mission was launched on 2nd October 2014, on Mahatma Gandhi's 145th birth anniversary.

questions.q: Which fine applies for smoking in a public place under COTPA 2003?
questions.exp: Section 4 of COTPA 2003 imposes a fine of ₹200 for smoking in any public place.

questions.q: What does the Energy Conservation Act 2001 aim to do?
questions.exp: The Energy Conservation Act 2001 establishes BEE and empowers it to enforce energy efficiency standards.
